name: Sausage, Beef, and Ribs with Rigatoni
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dry red wine or water
1 1/2 pounds Boneless chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 pound Italian sausage, sliced into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté onions and garlic in oil until tender. Remove and set aside.
2. Add chuck to the pan and brown on all sides. Remove the meat to the onion dish.
3. Add sausage and brown. Return all ingredients to the pan.
4. Add ribs, marinara sauce, water or wine, tomato paste, and spices. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover partially, and simmer for 3 hours or until the chuck is very tender, degreasing occasionally.
6. Just before serving, stir in basil.
7. Divide pasta among six bowls and top with meat mixture, then cheese.
This is absolutely excellent. I made my spaghetti sauce in place of marinara sauce. Next time, change the ribs and beef and substitute round steak. The wine makes it!
